## Problem

What research workflow problem should this solve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the user-facing behavior.

## Why TraceMind

Why does this belong in an AI personal research workbench rather than a generic note app, chat app, or document manager?

## Evidence Or Prior Art

Link related tools, papers, APIs, or workflows if relevant.

## Trust And Safety

How should the feature preserve evidence, citations, uncertainty, privacy, or model-provider boundaries?
